page.title: Today's Review
page.description: Focus on due items first. When you want something new, go back to Dashboard and continue today's plan.

empty.doneDescription: You cleared all currently due review items. Come back later if more items become due.
empty.noDueDescription: Once items reach their next review time, they will appear here automatically.

current.label: Current review
current.hint: You can review inline below, or open the full module page if you need the full workflow.

upNext.title: Up Next
upNext.lastItem: This is the last due review item for now.

inline.title: Inline Review
inline.description: Complete this item here and the queue will advance automatically.
